title: alchemilla vulgaris subsp. filicaulis
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris subsp. filicaulis, also known as lady's mantle, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and tannins. The health benefits of lady's mantle include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and promote wound healing. Lady's mantle is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used topically in the form of creams or ointments to treat skin conditions.
